issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page containing only links to archived report editions, not substantive content
No actual financial stability assessments, risk factors, or market-moving information present

corrected_fields.summary: This page is a navigation index for the Federal Reserve's Financial Stability Report publications, listing links to HTML and PDF versions across multiple years (2018-2025). It provides no substantive content about market structure or macro catalysts, serving only as a directory to archived reports. No specific financial stability assessments, risk factors, or market-moving information is present in this source.
